title: Two Worlders
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Two Worlders''' were group of political activists operating at the time of the [[Corellian Crisis|Starbuster Plot]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]. They sought an independent government for the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]], otherwise known as the [[Double Worlds]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
